moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches the Quarter-final stage today, with France facing Morocco, as teams battle for a spot in the semi-finals.

angles.name: Today's Big Game
angles.copy: World Cup Quarter-Finals start tonight! Who are you backing: France or Morocco? Kick-off 9pm.

angles.name: England's Next Challenge
angles.copy: England are in the World Cup Quarter-Finals this weekend! They face Norway on Saturday at 10pm. Can the Three Lions roar into the semis? #England #WorldCup

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 will conclude this weekend, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals taking place on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Tennis Showdown
angles.copy: It's Finals Weekend at Wimbledon! Who will lift the trophies on Centre Court? Get ready for some epic tennis action. #Wimbledon

angles.name: London's Grand Slam
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world are on SW19 this weekend! Wimbledon reaches its thrilling climax – who's your pick for the champions?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Nears
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 is just two weeks away, taking place from July 23-26 at Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Counting Down to Latitude
angles.copy: Two weeks until Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park! Who are you most excited to see – David Byrne, Lewis Capaldi, or Teddy Swims? #Latitude2026 #Suffolk

angles.name: Festival Vibes Coming
angles.copy: Get ready for Latitude! Lewis Capaldi and Teddy Swims are set to headline later this month. Who's got their tickets ready?

moments.title: New UK No.1 Single
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the current UK Official Singles Chart Number 1, holding the top spot for the week of July 2-8, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: New UK Number 1! Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean for 'Rein Me In' topping the Official Singles Chart. Playing it loud now! #OfficialCharts

angles.name: Sam Fender's Success
angles.copy: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are at Number 1 on the UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'! Massive track, well deserved. #SamFender

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Remake
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the beloved classic 'Little House on the Prairie' premieres today, July 9, on Netflix.

angles.name: Prairie Debut
angles.copy: The classic 'Little House on the Prairie' gets a modern refresh! The new adaptation drops on Netflix today. Will you be tuning in? #LittleHouseOnThePrairie

angles.name: Family TV
angles.copy: Nostalgia alert! The new 'Little House on the Prairie' series is available on Netflix from today. Perfect for some family viewing!

moments.title: New Scottish Thriller 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: ITV is set to release 'The Dark', a new six-part Scottish crime drama starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, later this month.

angles.name: New ITV Drama
angles.copy: Looking for your next TV obsession? ITV's new Scottish crime thriller 'The Dark' is coming later this month! Who's excited? #TheDark #ITV

angles.name: Scottish Scandi-Noir
angles.copy: A new Scottish crime drama is on its way to ITV! 'The Dark' promises moody thrills set in the stunning Scottish wilderness. Perfect for a rainy night in! #ScottishTV

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: Jack White, the influential musician known for The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and The Dead Weather, turns 51 today.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Jack White! From The White Stripes to his solo work, a true rock innovator. What's your favourite Jack White track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday today.

angles.name: Grunge Queen's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 62nd Birthday to the iconic Courtney Love! The Hole legend still commands attention. What's your top Hole song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Marc Almond
moments.blurb: Marc Almond, the distinctive voice of Soft Cell and a successful solo artist, turns 69 today.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the legendary Marc Almond! From 'Tainted Love' to his incredible solo career, a true pioneer. What's your favourite Soft Cell classic?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead singer of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Pet Shop Boy's Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 72nd Birthday of Neil Tennant from Pet Shop Boys! Get ready for some classic synth-pop. What's your go-to Pet Shop Boys track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Perrie Edwards
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards will be celebrating her 33rd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Pop Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow's a big one for Perrie Edwards! Wishing the Little Mix star a very Happy 33rd Birthday. What's your favourite Little Mix hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mavis Staples
moments.blurb: The legendary soul and gospel singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers and her powerful solo career, turns 87 tomorrow.

angles.name: Soul Legend Turns 87
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples tomorrow! A true icon of soul and gospel music. What's your favourite Staple Singers song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on Saturday.

angles.name: Folk-Pop Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the wonderful Suzanne Vega this Saturday! Her unique storytelling has captivated us for decades. What's your favourite Suzanne Vega track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock icon Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Rock Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a rocking Happy 67th Birthday to Richie Sambora this Saturday! The Bon Jovi legend's guitar riffs are iconic. What's your favourite Bon Jovi anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a rock legend! Brian May of Queen turns 79 on July 19th. His guitar work is simply iconic. What's your favourite Queen song with a Brian May solo?
